hooks.command: echo '📍 Branch:' && git branch --show-current && echo '' && echo '📝 Recent commits:' && git log --oneline -5 && echo '' && echo '📂 Uncommitted changes:' && git status --short | head -10 || true
if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: You have uncommitted changes!' && git status --short; fi

file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *local.properties* ]] || [[ "$file_path" == *google-services.json* ]] || [[ "$file_path" == *.keystore* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit secrets/credentials file' && exit 1; fi
